creator: tochansky@tochlab.net
text:
Ok. Here is additional info.

Did the same but this time upgraded via sources as written at https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/cutting-edge/#makeworld

Reboot after 'make buildword' and 'make kernel' is fine. 'uname' shows 13.0-p1 and freebsd-version shows 12.2-p7 but after 'make installworld' and reboot system hangs again.
